meta_improvements: This session deliberately separates frozen-artifact judgment from freeze execution and publish, preserving SHA stability for the G3 citation path.

The frozen close-ack.md text talks about pipeline/ cleanliness broadly; the hygiene session narrowed G3 to the 5 measurement anchors. This narrowing is operational (not an edit to close-ack.md) and should be recorded in the Gate 2 PR body so future reviewers see the full context without needing to replay the hygiene session.
Commit 1 subject line begins with a UTF-8 BOM (EF BB BF). Amending the commit would break the G3 citation. The BOM should be called out in the Gate 2 PR body instead.
Auth status continues to oscillate (401 at Turn 1, 200 at Turn 2). Future sessions must re-probe at turn start rather than assume continuity.
Gate 2 publish MUST use `gh pr merge --merge`. --squash and --rebase are both forbidden because they rewrite the commit graph and would destroy the G3-cited commit-1 SHA.
